_comment: Hand-authored waypoint graph for server-side bot nav (Phase 11.0). Nodes placed so every edge has clear LOS between its endpoints — straight-line + collide-and-slide between adjacent nodes never snags. The graph covers the full D-loop: spine corridor, curve, counter, and both spawns. Seed points from the original PATROL_CT/T. Single source of truth: loaded by both Rust server (serde) and TS client (import). 13 nodes, symmetric across z=0. 'weight' biases search-goal selection: spine nodes (killbox) are low, curve/flank nodes are high.
